{{Quote|I've just received a message from Arbra Base. Long-range scans have picked up small craft entering this quadrant. Undenably Imperial.|Shahn|<ref name="marvel58" />}}
'''Shahn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] communications officer working for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] under the command of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Shahn was part of the crew of the central [[Kerts-Bhrg field generator]] during an ambitious Rebel project to use five Krts-Bhrg generators to create a field that could hide the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] within the chromosphere of the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Arbran]]. As the test started, Shahn received a warning from the nearby [[Haven Base]] on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] that scanners had detected [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] craft entering the quadrant, and relayed the warning to Organa.<ref name="marvel58" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shahn appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' 58]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel58" />
